subject: [PATCH v4 1/4] mm: track DONTCACHE dirty pages per bdi_writeback

2026-05-01.patch_summary: This patch adds a new counter, WB_DONTCACHE_DIRTY, to track the number of dirty pages that have been dirtied via RWF_DONTCACHE writes (i.e., pages with the dropbehind flag set). The counter is incremented when a folio is dirtied and decremented when it's cleaned or cleared. This allows the writeback flusher to expedite writeback for IOCB_DONTCACHE writes without flushing the entire BDI's dirty pages. The patch modifies several kernel functions, including folio_account_dirtied(), folio_clear_dirty_for_io(), and __filemap_get_folio_mpol().
